commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh But it was so, that in the three and twentieth year of king Jehoash, the priests had not repaired the damages of the house. It is not known when the king gave his orders; but they were executed with negligence, as they seemed to interfere (Calmet) with the emoluments assigned by the law to the Levites, 2 Paralipomenon xxiv. (Haydock) The latter Jews were obliged to pay half a sicle towards the repairs of the temple.
